description: Governed revision id derivation (rev_<entityType>_<entityId>_<stateDigest12>_<sha256(changeId)8>). The change-scoped suffix keeps a rollback to a byte-identical earlier state a DISTINCT revision while replays of the same change stay idempotent. The design target remains a host-assigned ordinal suffix; hosts that assign ordinals supersede this derivation.

cases.name: rollback restoring the identical state A must yield a DISTINCT id
replaying the same change is idempotent (identical id to the first case)
